message:
feat: Asyncify for transparent http.Get/Post, fix query string parsing

- Add overlay/net/http/client.go with http.Get, Post, Head, NewRequest,
  Client.Do using //go:wasmimport env __gomode_fetch
- Add Asyncify runtime in worker.ts — suspend/resume WASM when Go calls
  outbound fetch, JS does await fetch(), resumes Go transparently
- Add wasm-opt --asyncify step to build pipeline (+17KB overhead)
- Fix build script: patch TinyGo's TINYGOROOT/src/net/http directly
  (cached GOROOT patching didn't work — TinyGo prioritizes its own src/)
- Fix query string: pass full path+query to WASM, parse URL.RawQuery in Go
- Users write http.Get("https://...") — standard Go, zero code changes
